final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-character-art
Asset type: game character splash art / visual novel standing illustration (古风游戏立绘)
Primary request: a mysterious elegant Chinese ancient-style female character in hanfu, playing guqin in a bamboo forest under moonlight
Scene/backdrop: dense bamboo forest at night, moonlight filtering through bamboo leaves casting dappled shadow patterns on the ground
Subject: young woman in flowing hanfu with wide sleeves, seated gracefully before a guqin zither, long black hair adorned with jade hairpin, ethereal and otherworldly presence
Style/medium: Chinese ancient-style digital illustration, ink-wash influenced painting with soft cel shading, game character art aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium full-body shot, slightly low angle, subject centered with bamboo framing both sides, vertical portrait orientation
Lighting/mood: cool silver moonlight as key light filtering through bamboo canopy, soft scattered light spots (月光斑驳), dreamy and mysterious atmosphere, 仙气十足
Color palette: cool silver-white moonlight + deep jade green bamboo + soft ivory and pale blue hanfu + subtle gold accent on guqin
Materials/textures: flowing silk fabric with gentle motion (衣袂飘飘), smooth lacquered guqin surface, delicate bamboo leaf silhouettes
Constraints: full hanfu attire must remain traditional and modest; bamboo forest must be clearly identifiable; guqin must be present and recognizable
Avoid: modern clothing elements, overly dark unreadable shadows, cluttered background that competes with character, watermark
